editusergroup: jan la o lukin e kulupu wawa
editinguser: {{GENDER:$1|jan}} [[User:$1|$1]] $2 la sina ante e kulupu wawa
viewinguserrights: {{GENDER:$1|jan}} [[User:$1|$1]] $2 la sina lukin e kulupu wawa
userrights-editusergroup: {{GENDER:$1|jan}} la o ante e kulupu wawa
userrights-viewusergroup: {{GENDER:$1|jan}} la o lukin e kulupu wawa
saveusergroups: {{GENDER:$1|jan}} la o pini e ante pi kulupu wawa
userrights-groupsmember-auto: kulupu ante la, jan li lon kulupu ni:
userrights-systemuser: {{GENDER:$1|jan ni}} li kama tan ilo MesijaWiki
userrights-no-interwiki: ma ante la sina ken ala ante e wawa jan
userrights-nodatabase: poki sona "$1" li lon ala. anu ona li tan kulupu ma ante.
userrights-restricted-group-warning: jan ale ala li ken lon kulupu ni
userrights-changeable-col: sina ken ante e kulupu ni:
userrights-unchangeable-col: sina ken ala ante e kulupu ni:
userrights-expiry-options: ni li pini lon tenpo suno 1:1 day,ni li pini lon tenpo esun 1:1 week,ni li pini lon tenpo mun 1:1 month,ni li pini lon tenpo mun 3:3 months,ni li pini lon tenpo mun 6:6 months,ni li pini lon tenpo sike 1:1 year
userrights-invalid-expiry: kulupu "$1" la tenpo pini li ken ala.
userrights-expiry-in-past: kulupu "$1" la tenpo pini li lon pini.
userrights-no-group: sijelo pi nimi ala li lon ala kulupu.
userrights-conflict: ijo ante a li ante e wawa pi jan ni! o lukin sin e ante wile sina, o toki e pona ona.
right-read: ona li ken lukin e lipu
right-edit: ona li ken ante e lipu
right-createpage: ona li ken pali e lipu sona
right-createtalk: ona li ken pali e lipu toki
right-createaccount: ona li ken pali e sijelo sin
right-autocreateaccount: ilo la ona li ken kama lon sijelo tan ma ante.
right-minoredit: ona li ken lili e ante
right-move: ona li ken ante e nimi lipu
right-move-subpages: ona li ken ante e nimi lipu e nimi pi lipu insa
right-move-rootuserpages: ona li ken ante e nimi pi lipu jan
right-move-categorypages: ona li ken ante e nimi pi lipu kulupu
right-movefile: ona li ken ante e nimi pi lipu sitelen
right-suppressredirect: ona li ken weka e linja tawa lon tawa lipu
right-upload: ona li ken pana e sitelen
right-reupload: ona li ken anpa e sitelen kepeken sitelen sin.
right-reupload-own: ona li ken anpa e sitelen pi pana ona kepeken sitelen sin.
right-reupload-shared: ona li ken anpa e sitelen tan poki sitelen kulupu lon ma ni.
right-upload_by_url: ona li ken pana e sitelen tan linja tawa
right-purge: tan poki sona la o sin e lipu.
right-autoconfirmed: nanpa IP la lili pi wawa pali li pali e ala tawa ona.
right-nominornewtalk: tomo toki jan la toki ona li pana ala e sona "jan li toki sin tawa sina".
right-apihighlimits: ilo API la ona li ken alasa e sona mute lon alasa wan.
right-delete: ona li ken weka e lipu
right-delete-redirect: ona li ken weka e lipu tawa pi ante wan taso.
right-bigdelete: ona li ken weka e lipu pi pini suli.
right-deletelogentry: ona li ken weka e sona pi pali namako, li ken sin e ona.
right-deleterevision: ona li ken weka e ante, li ken sin e ona.
right-deletedhistory: ona li ken lukin e pini lipu weka. taso ante ni la ni li pana ala e sona pi jo ona.
right-deletedtext: ona li ken lukin e jo pi ante weka.
right-undelete: ona li ken kama sin e lipu
right-suppressrevision: ona li ken len wawa e ante lipu, li ken lukin e ante pi len wawa, li ken weka e len wawa ona.
right-viewsuppressed: ona li ken lukin e ante pi len wawa.
right-suppressionlog: ona li ken lukin e pini len.
right-block: ona li ken weka e ken pali pi jan ante
right-blockemail: ona li ken weka e ken jan pi nasin Email
right-hideuser: ona li weka e kan jan la, ona li ken len e nimi ona tan jan mute. ona li ken sin e jan la, ona li ken weka e len ni.
right-ipblock-exempt: weka ken pi nanpa IP en weka ken pi kulupu nanpa IP en weka ken pi jan poka li pali e ala tawa ona.
right-unblockself: ona li ken kama e ken pali tan ona.
right-protect: ona li ken ante e nasin awen, li ken ante e lipu pi awen insa.
right-editprotected: lipu li awen "{{int:restriction-level-sysop}}" la, ona li ken ante e ni.
right-editsemiprotected: lipu li awen "{{int:restriction-level-autoconfirmed}}" la, ona li ken ante e ni.
right-editcontentmodel: ona li ken ante e nasin lipu
right-editinterface: ona li ken ante e selo lipu
right-editusercss: ona li ken ante e lipu jan pi toki ilo CSS
right-edituserjson: ona li ken ante e lipu jan pi toki ilo JSON
right-edituserjs: ona li ken ante e lipu jan pi toki ilo JavaScript

right-editsitejson: lipu ale la ona li ken ante e lipu pi toki ilo JSON
right-editsitejs: lipu ale la ona li ken ante e lipu pi toki ilo JavaScript

right-editmyuserjson: ona li ken ante e lipu ona pi toki ilo JSON
right-editmyuserjs: ona li ken ante e lipu ona pi toki ilo JavaScript
right-editmyuserjsredirect: ona li ken ante e lipu tawa JavaScript ona.
right-viewmywatchlist: sina ken lukin e lipu lukin sina.
right-editmywatchlist: ona li ken ante e lipu lukin ona. (jan li jo ala e wawa ni la, ona li awen ken pana e lipu tawa lipu lukin kepeken ijo ante.)
right-viewmyprivateinfo: ona li ken lukin e sona len ona (sama ni: nimi pi ilo Email, en nimi jan pi ilo ala)
right-editmyprivateinfo: ona li ken ante e sona len ona li ken ante e nimi open
right-editmyoptions: ona li ken ante e wile ilo
right-rollback: ona li ken weka wawa e ante pi jan nanpa pini lon lipu wan.
right-markbotedits: ona li ken pana e sona "mi ilo" tawa weka wawa
right-noratelimit: lili pi wawa pali li pali e ala tawa ona.
right-import: ona li ken kama e lipu tan ma lipu ante
right-importupload: ona li ken lanpan e lipu kepeken sitelen XML
right-patrol: pali pi jan ante la ona li ken toki e pona
right-autopatrol: ilo li toki e pona pi pali ona.
right-pagelang: ona li ken ante e toki lipu.
right-patrolmarks: ilo pi pali sin la ona li ken lukin e sona pi pona pali.
right-renameuser: ona li ken ante e nimi jan.
right-renameuser-global: ona li ken ante e nimi jan lon ma ali.
right-unwatchedpages: lipu seme jan ala li lukin e ante? ona li sona e ni.
right-mergehistory: ona li ken wan e pini lipu.
right-userrights: ona li ken ante e ken sijelo
right-userrights-interwiki: ona li ken ante e ken sijelo lon ma lipu ante
right-ignore-restricted-groups: jan mute li ken ala ante e wawa kulupu la, ona li awen ken lon tenpo mute.
right-siteadmin: ona li ken kiwen e poki sona, li ken pini e kiwen.
right-override-export-depth: ona li ken jo e lipu, e lipu insa ona tawa insa nanpa 5.
right-sendemail: ona li pana e toki Email tawa jan ante
right-managechangetags: ona li ken pali e [[Special:Tags|kule pali]], li ken open e ona, li ken pini e ona.
right-applychangetags: pali ona la ona li ken pana e [[Special:Tags|kule]].
right-changetags: ona li ken pana e [[Special:Tags|kule]] tawa ante, tawa pali namako, li ken weka e ni.
